serverInfo.name: cesium-mcp-runtime
serverInfo.title: Cesium MCP Runtime
serverInfo.description: AI-powered 3D globe control via MCP — camera, layers, entities, animation, and interaction with CesiumJS.

tools.name: flyTo
tools.description: 飞行到指定经纬度位置（带动画过渡）

pitch.description: 俯仰角（度），-90 为正下方

tools.name: addGeoJsonLayer
tools.description: 添加 GeoJSON 图层到地图（支持 Point/Line/Polygon，可配置颜色/分级/分类渲染）

style.description: 样式配置（color, opacity, pointSize, choropleth, category）

tools.name: addLabel
tools.description: 为 GeoJSON 要素添加文本标注（显示属性值）

field.description: 用作标注文本的属性字段名（如 "name"、"population"）

style.description: 标注样式（font, fillColor, outlineColor, scale 等）

tools.name: addHeatmap
tools.description: 添加热力图图层（基于 GeoJSON 点数据生成热力可视化）

tools.name: removeLayer
tools.description: 从地图上移除指定图层（按图层ID）

id.description: 要移除的图层ID（可通过 listLayers 获取）

tools.name: setBasemap
tools.description: 切换底图风格（暗色/卫星影像/标准）

basemap.description: 底图类型：dark=暗色, satellite=卫星影像, standard=标准

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: 截取当前地图视图（返回 base64 PNG）

tools.name: highlight
tools.description: 高亮指定图层的要素

featureIndex.description: 要素索引（不传则高亮全部）

tools.name: setView
tools.description: 瞬间切换到指定经纬度视角（无动画）

tools.name: getView
tools.description: 获取当前相机视角信息（经纬度、高度、角度）

tools.name: zoomToExtent
tools.description: 缩放到指定地理范围

tools.name: addMarker
tools.description: 在指定经纬度添加标注点，返回 layerId 供后续操作

id.description: 自定义图层ID（不传则自动生成）

tools.name: addPolyline
tools.description: 在地图上添加折线（路径、线段），返回 entityId

coordinates.description: 折线坐标数组 [[lon, lat, height?], ...]

tools.name: addPolygon
tools.description: 在地图上添加多边形区域（面积、边界），返回 entityId

coordinates.description: 多边形外环坐标 [[lon, lat, height?], ...]

extrudedHeight.description: 拉伸高度（米），可用于创建立体效果

tools.name: addModel
tools.description: 在指定经纬度放置 3D 模型（glTF/GLB），返回 entityId

tools.name: updateEntity
tools.description: 更新已有实体的属性（位置、颜色、标签、缩放、可见性）

entityId.description: 实体ID（addMarker/addPolyline 等返回的 entityId）

tools.name: removeEntity
tools.description: 移除单个实体（通过 entityId）

tools.name: setLayerVisibility
tools.description: 设置图层可见性

tools.name: listLayers
tools.description: 获取当前所有图层列表（含 ID、名称、类型、可见性）

tools.name: updateLayerStyle
tools.description: 修改已有图层的样式（颜色、透明度、标注样式等）

labelStyle.description: 标注样式（font, fillColor, outlineColor, outlineWidth, scale 等）

layerStyle.description: 图层样式（color, opacity, strokeWidth, pointSize）

tools.name: playTrajectory
tools.description: 播放移动轨迹动画

coordinates.description: 轨迹坐标数组 [[lon, lat, alt?], ...]

tools.name: load3dTiles
tools.description: 加载 3D Tiles 数据集（如建筑白膜、城市模型）

maximumScreenSpaceError.description: 最大屏幕空间误差（值越小越精细）

tools.name: loadTerrain
tools.description: 加载或切换地形（平坦/ArcGIS/CesiumIon/自定义 URL）

cesiumIonAssetId.description: Cesium Ion 资产ID（provider=cesiumion 时需要）

tools.name: loadImageryService
tools.description: 加载影像服务图层（WMS/WMTS/XYZ/ArcGIS MapServer）

tools.name: lookAtTransform
tools.description: Look at a specific position from a given heading/pitch/range (orbit-style camera)

tools.name: startOrbit
tools.description: Start orbiting the camera around the current view center

tools.name: stopOrbit
tools.description: Stop the camera orbit animation

tools.name: setCameraOptions
tools.description: Configure camera controller options (enable/disable rotation, zoom, tilt, etc.)

tools.name: addBillboard
tools.description: Add a billboard (image icon) at a position on the globe

tools.name: addBox
tools.description: Add a 3D box entity at a position

material.description: Material (color string, RGBA object, or material spec)

tools.name: addCorridor
tools.description: Add a corridor (path with width) entity

positions.description: Array of positions along the corridor

tools.name: addCylinder
tools.description: Add a cylinder or cone entity at a position

tools.name: addEllipse
tools.description: Add an ellipse (oval) entity at a position

tools.name: addRectangle
tools.description: Add a rectangle entity defined by geographic bounds

tools.name: addWall
tools.description: Add a wall entity along a series of positions

positions.description: Array of positions along the wall

tools.name: createAnimation
tools.description: Create a time-based animation with waypoints (moving entity along a path)

waypoints.description: Array of waypoints with positions and timestamps

modelUri.description: glTF/GLB model URL, or preset: cesium_man, cesium_air, ground_vehicle, cesium_drone

tools.name: controlAnimation
tools.description: Play or pause the current animation

tools.name: removeAnimation
tools.description: Remove an animation entity

entityId.description: Entity ID of the animation to remove

tools.name: listAnimations
tools.description: List all active animations

tools.name: updateAnimationPath
tools.description: Update the visual properties of an animation path

tools.name: trackEntity
tools.description: Track (follow) an entity with the camera, or stop tracking

entityId.description: Entity ID to track (omit to stop tracking)

tools.name: controlClock
tools.description: Configure the Cesium clock (time range, speed, animation state)

time.description: ISO 8601 time to jump to (for setTime)

tools.name: setGlobeLighting
tools.description: Enable/disable globe lighting and atmospheric effects

dynamicAtmosphereLightingFromSun.description: Use sun position for atmosphere lighting

resources.name: camera
resources.description: 当前相机状态（经纬度、高度、角度）

resources.name: layers
resources.description: 当前已加载的图层列表（ID、名称、类型、可见性）

prompts.name: cesium-quickstart
prompts.description: Quick reference for using Cesium MCP tools
